topics.title: Wealth Inequality & Mobility
topics.description: Relative vs. absolute inequality, intergenerational mobility, and what the data actually shows about opportunity in market economies.

topics.title: Profit, Exploitation & "The Rich Get Richer"
topics.description: Labor theory of value, surplus value, profit as coordination signal, and why voluntary exchange is not theft.

topics.title: Historical Record of Socialism
topics.description: Documented outcomes in the USSR, Maoist China, Venezuela, Cuba, Cambodia, and other socialist experiments.

topics.title: The Nordic Model Myth & "Democratic Socialism"
topics.description: What Scandinavia actually runs — market economies with high taxes, not socialist ownership of production.

topics.title: Human Nature, Incentives & Economic Calculation
topics.description: Calculation problem, knowledge problem, incentive structures, and why central planning fails at scale.

topics.title: Government Intervention
topics.description: Minimum wage, healthcare, UBI, education, Green New Deal, rent control — evidence on intervention outcomes.

topics.title: Global Poverty, Capitalism & Absolute Living Standards
topics.description: World Bank absolute poverty metrics, global GDP growth, and the unprecedented decline in extreme poverty since 1990.

topics.title: American Founding Principles vs. Collectivism
topics.description: Natural rights, limited government, rule of law, and why the Founders rejected collectivist schemes.

topics.title: Free Speech, Dissent & Socialist Regimes
topics.description: Censorship, political prisoners, and the consistent suppression of dissent under socialist governments.

topics.title: Myths About "Late-Stage Capitalism" & Inequality Metrics
topics.description: Debunking the narrative that market economies are in terminal decline.
